SummaryOfDirectChrtblActyGrp.Description1Txt: CHARTER FUND, INC (THE "FUND") PRIMARILY PROVIDES GRANTS AND LOANS TO CHARTER SCHOOL MANAGEMENT ORGANIZATIONS WHICH MANAGE AND GROW NETWORKS OF SCHOOLS. THE FUNDS ONLY SUPPORT ORGANIZATIONS WHICH CAN DEMONSTRATE AN IMPACT ON UNDERSERVED STUDENT POPULATIONS AND OUTSTANDING VALUE ADDED ACADEMIC GAINS. THE FUND FOCUSES ON GEOGRAPHIC AREAS SUPPORTIVE OF FURTHER EXPANSION OF CHARTER SCHOOLS. THE FUND DISTRIBUTED $ 46,862,953 OF GRANTS TO OR FOR THE BENEFIT OR CHARTER SCHOOL MANAGEMENT ORGANIZATIONS AND INCURRED ADDITIONAL CHARITABLE EXPENSES OF $ 12,974,716 DURING THE CALENDAR YEAR ENDED DECEMBER 31, 2018. IN ADDITION, THE FUND ISSUED $28,375,000 OF LOANS TO CHARTER SCHOOL MANAGEMENT ORGANIZATIONS DURING THE CALENDAR YEAR ENDING DECEMBER 31, 2018. SEE PART IX-B AND XV FOR A DETAILED LISTING OF LOANS AND GRANTS DURING THE CURRENT YEAR.

SumOfProgramRelatedInvstGrp.Description2Txt: PRI LOAN TO BROOKLYN LABORATORY CHARTER SCHOOLS TO PROMOTE CHARTER SCHOOL GROWTH

ApplicationSubmissionInfoGrp.RestrictionsOnAwardsTxt: CHARTER FUND, INC (THE "FUND") PRIMARILY PROVIDES GRANTS AND LOANS TO CHARTER SCHOOL MANAGEMENT ORGANIZATIONS THAT MANAGE AND GROW NETWORKS OF SCHOOLS. THE FUNDS ONLY SUPPORT ORGANIZATIONS WHICH CAN DEMONSTRATE AN IMPACT ON UNDERSERVED STUDENT POPULATIONS AND OUTSTANDING VALUE ADDED ACADEMIC GAINS. THE FUND FOCUSES ON GEOGRAPHIC AREAS SUPPORTIVE OF FURTHER EXPANSION OF CHARTER SCHOOLS.

ExpenditureResponsibilityGrp.PurposeOfGrantTxt: PROGRAM RELATED INVESTMENT - CHARTER FUND, INC. ACQUIRED SUBSTANTIALLY ALL THE ASSETS (EXCLUDING ANY ASSETS SUBJECT TO LIABILITIES) OF DREAMBOX LEARNING, INC. DREAMBOX LEARNING INC. IS AN EARLY-STAGE, FOR-PROFIT SOFTWARE COMPANY THAT PROVIDES ADAPTIVE LEARNING SOFTWARE FOR ELEMENTARY SCHOOL-AGE CHILDREN.
ExpenditureResponsibilityGrp.ResultsOfVerificationTxt: FINANCIAL REPORTS ARE RECEIVED ON A QUARTERLY BASIS. THE PRESIDENT/CEO OF CHARTER FUND, INC. SITS ON THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS OF DREAMBOX LEARNING, INC.
